notes: Mode: rsync-dir. Snapshots the Paper server's world tree + plugin data via tar+gzip piped over ssh to local backups/kobiicraft/. The remote needs only tar+gzip (POSIX universal). restore_test extracts the level.dat NBT root and verifies the gzip-NBT magic (first byte 0x0a after gunzip). expected_size_bytes=5 GiB is a conservative estimate; tune per pilot population. Retention: keep 10 most recent OR within 30 days OR min 3, whichever yields the larger set.
